title: Visible Enchanted Books
description: This is a custom resource pack designed to enhance your Minecraft experience by making it easy to distinguish enchanted books at a glance!
body:
You'll need Optifine or CITresewn!

 ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/09603f94c10cb84f2e1cb590c5211c60e0b10c0c.png)

This is a custom resource pack designed to enhance your Minecraft experience by making it easy to distinguish enchanted books at a glance!

 

With this pack, each enchanted book features a unique, visually distinct texture based on its enchantment.

 

No more hovering over each book to check its enchantment 'cause now, just by seeing the book's charming texture, you'll know exactly what magic it holds.

 

Whether you're organizing your inventory or trading with villagers, this resource pack adds a new level of convenience and style to your enchanted items collection!

 

Features:
 
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d65e01687e9f1cff0657aab598b66ef056522ce.png)

- Enchantments names are grouped into icons depending of the target item (e.g., axe, sword, tool, armor) in item desc for easier identification.
- Enchantments numbers are color-coded based on their level, making it easy to identify the power of a book.
- Unenchanted or written books will receive new textures if they have a personalised name to differentiate them from enchanted books depending on the letter the name starts with.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84c7bffaf2e57bfa0c8a60187573dfce8e520d0c.png)
